South Africa's EN590 Bulk Fuel Platform

Trade EN590 Fuel
With Verified Confidence

FuelBridge connects DMRE-licensed sellers and buyers for bulk EN590 transactions of 1M+ litres. Anonymous matching, NCNDA-protected introductions, transparent referral commissions.

How It Works

From listing to deal closure

Structured stages, legally protected at every step.

01

Register & Verify

Submit your DMRE wholesale licence and CIPC registration. Platform review within 48 hours.

02

Post Anonymously

List your volume, price, and preferred deal method (CoC or In-Tank Transfer). Displayed as an anonymous ID until introduction contract is signed.

03

Negotiate & Agree

Price negotiation within the platform. Once both sides accept, the platform administrator is notified and facilitates the IMFPA signing.

04

Close the Deal

Upon admin approval, identities are revealed. Parties exchange verification documents directly and proceed to settlement.

Commission Structure

Transparent. Fair. Protected.

R 0.10 per litre, paid by the seller at deal close. Referrals earn R 0.02/L for each verified party they introduce.

Seller Pays
R 0.10/L
Total commission
→
Platform
R 0.06/L
Base platform fee
+
Seller-side Referral
R 0.02/L
If party was introduced
Buyer-side Referral
R 0.02/L
If party was introduced
💡
No referral on a side? That R 0.02/L flows back to the platform. Referral commission is paid within 3 business days of platform fee receipt. IMFPA signatures lock all commission obligations legally.

Why Choose FuelBridge?

Unlike traditional fuel trading, FuelBridge eliminates counterparty risk by enforcing strict DMRE verification for every participant. We provide a transparent, legally protected ecosystem for bulk diesel transactions in Gauteng and across South Africa.

Compliance & Legal Protection

Built for South Africa's fuel trade

🏛️

DMRE Licensed Only

Every participant must hold a valid DMRE Wholesale Licence, verified against CIPC registration before any listing goes live.

📄

NCNDA / IMFPA Protected

Introductions are legally bound. The platform administrator facilitates IMFPA signing before identities are revealed. Off-platform trades breach signed contracts.

🔒

Anonymous Until Approved

Company names and contacts are never exposed before the administrator approves the introduction. Only anonymous IDs and broad regions are visible on the public board.

📋

Platform as Introducer

FuelBridge is an introduction platform only — not a principal to any transaction. All liability for product quality, payment, and delivery rests with the contracting parties.

⚠️

Document Disclaimer

Parties exchange verification documents (POP, POF, Dip Test, etc.) directly between themselves. The platform does not verify the authenticity of those documents and accepts no liability.

🛡️

POPIA Compliant

All personal and company data is stored and processed in accordance with South Africa's Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA).

Ready to trade?

Register in minutes. Listed within 48 hours.

🏭
I have fuel to sell
List your EN590 volume, price, and deal method. Reach verified buyers.
💼
I want to buy fuel
Post your volume, bid price, and deal method. Get matched with DMRE-verified sellers.
🤝
I know a buyer or seller
Register their details, earn R 0.02/litre referral commission when a deal closes.
